title: Risk Scoring + Security Telemetry — Finding Correlator & z-Score Anomaly
description: tests/risk/test_scoring.py, test_network_anomaly_detector.py, and test_risk_scoring_unit.py cluster with test_finding_correlator.py and test_telemetry_runtime.py. The finding correlator uses CVE ID extraction and telemetry runtime has z-score anomaly detection. Gap: the risk scorer computes composite scores per finding but does not aggregate to an org-level risk score that updates the security_posture dashboard in real time.
missing: Org-level risk aggregation: every time a finding risk_score changes, recompute org_risk_score = weighted_avg(finding scores) and write to posture_score_engine.db for dashboard display
Telemetry anomaly → alert: when z-score anomaly detector fires, publish an alert to notification_engine with the metric name, value, and z-score
Finding correlator CVE cluster: group correlated findings by CVE cluster and present them as a single campaign finding with aggregate CVSS
